name: ORC | Sharn
description:
! WLW !

ᴇʟꜰ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

An elven girl, bathing in that secret little lake while the sun sets in the distance..

Something Sharn didn’t expect to see on her hunting trip.

...

Her sworn ememy, right there, alone, with no one to help her.

A perfect opportunity.

…

So why won’t she just shoot?

____________________________________

I’m sorry for being so inactive :( Just have a lot going on right now, so my motivation is running a bit low unfortunately

Art credits: Anna Veltkamp !
creator: ghoulett
